name: design-patterns
tagline: Reference guide to Rust design patterns (Newtype, Builder, State Machine, Trait Object, RAII, Strategy) for RTK's CLI filter modules.
verdict: Solid, benign reference skill: concrete code examples with stated criteria for each pattern, explicit anti-pattern guidance, no security or safety issues found. Clear triggering, internally consistent, appropriately sized. Only gap is no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
